# Alexa's Cleaning Services

> Professional house and commercial cleaning services in Placerville, CA and El Dorado County. Licensed, insured, no contracts, no rescheduling fees.

## Key Facts
- Business: Alexa's Cleaning Services
- Owner: K.E. Coleman, M.B.A
- Location: 2838 Schnell School Rd #2, Placerville, CA 95667
- Phone: (530) 214-6361
- License: #074540, County of El Dorado
- Service Area: Placerville, Cameron Park, Shingle Springs, Diamond Springs, El Dorado Hills, Pollock Pines
- Google Rating: 5.0 stars
- Stats: 307+ residencies cleaned, 86+ satisfied customers

## Services
- House Cleaning (one-time, weekly, bi-weekly, monthly)
- Deep Cleaning
- Commercial Cleaning (offices, retail, facilities)
- Post Construction Cleaning
- Airbnb Cleaning
- Apartment Cleaning (move-in/move-out)
- Church Cleaning
- Warehouse Cleaning
